div.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; padding: 8px 8px 8px 0px; font-family: aeonikFont, "aeonikFont Fallback"; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; font-size: 12px; line-height: 14px; color: rgb(140, 140, 140); flex-shrink: 0; width: 11.125rem; min-width: 11.125rem; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; white-space: normal; text-decoration-thickness: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial;
box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; display: flex; flex-direction: row; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; gap: 0.625rem;

box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; font-family: aeonikFont, "aeonikFont Fallback"; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1rem; text-align: center; width: 2.25rem; min-width: 2.25rem; flex-grow: 1;

button.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: inherit; line-height: inherit; color: rgb(179, 179, 179); margin: 0px; padding: 0px; text-transform: none; appearance: button; background-color: transparent; background-image: none; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; position: relative;

div.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; position: relative;

button.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: inherit; line-height: inherit; color: rgb(179, 179, 179); margin: 0px; padding: 0px; text-transform: none; appearance: button; background-color: transparent; background-image: none; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; position: relative;

div.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; position: relative;

button.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: inherit; line-height: inherit; color: rgb(179, 179, 179); margin: 0px; padding: 0px; text-transform: none; appearance: button; background-color: transparent; background-image: none; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; position: relative;

div.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; padding: 0px 8px; font-family: aeonikFont, "aeonikFont Fallback"; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; font-size: 12px; line-height: 14px; color: rgb(140, 140, 140); width: 394.812px; flex-grow: 1; overflow: hidden; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; white-space: normal; text-decoration-thickness: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial;
box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; overflow: hidden;
box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; display: flex; overflow: hidden;

a.title: Beyond The Sky
a.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; color: inherit; text-decoration: inherit;

div.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; width: 143.812px;
box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; overflow: hidden; width: 143.812px; display: grid; grid-auto-flow: column; position: relative; max-width: 17rem; white-space: nowrap;
box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; text-overflow: ellipsis; overflow: hidden; width: max-content; display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap;

span.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; font-family: aeonikFont, "aeonikFont Fallback"; font-style: normal; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.688rem; line-height: 1rem; letter-spacing: 0.005em; color: rgb(255, 255, 255);

div.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; width: 378.812px; flex-grow: 1; overflow: hidden;
box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; overflow: hidden; width: 272px; display: grid; grid-auto-flow: column; position: relative; max-width: 17rem; white-space: nowrap;
box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; text-overflow: ellipsis; overflow: hidden; width: max-content; display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap;

box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; font-family: aeonikFont, "aeonikFont Fallback"; font-style: normal; font-weight: 500; font-size: 11px; line-height: 16px; letter-spacing: 0.005em; color: rgb(57, 192, 222);

box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; padding: 0px 8px; font-family: aeonikFont, "aeonikFont Fallback"; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; font-size: 12px; line-height: 14px; color: rgb(140, 140, 140); width: 7.5rem; min-width: 7.5rem; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; white-space: normal; text-decoration-thickness: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial;

a.title: Future Sequence
a.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; color: inherit; text-decoration: inherit;

div.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; width: 104px;

a.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; color: inherit; text-decoration: inherit; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; display: block; text-overflow: ellipsis;

div.style: box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; width: 134px;
